name: creator_qa
purpose: Run a deterministic local publishing gate on a Markdown creator package and report packaging, script, factual-risk, and Resolve terminology issues.

input.schema: Creator QA package with top-level sections such as Title, Thumbnail, Hook, Script, Notes, Viewer Payoff, Factual Claims Needing Source, and Resolve Terminology Used.

output_modes.description: Default compact Markdown report for Hermes memory and user summaries.
Stable machine-readable gate result for automation.
Markdown issue/comment body for task tracking.
Write a full Markdown report to PATH.

safety_model.factual_claims: The tool flags risky claims that need source notes or manual verification; it does not verify truth.

recommended_hermes_usage: Run before publishing or approving a YouTube package, Resolve tutorial, script outline, or creator workflow handoff.
Treat FAIL as a publishing blocker.
Summarize the top three fixes to the user.
Ask the user to rerun Creator QA after edits.
Do not soften or override the gate result with vague encouragement.
guarantees: No mutation of the checked input file.
